stemHtml: Under the Tokyo Convention, the PIC has authority to enforce the law during unlawful interference. From what moment does "in-flight" begin?

options.a: From the moment the doors are closed at the gate.
options.b: From the moment the aircraft lifts off.
options.c: From the moment the throttle is advanced for take-off.
options.d: From the moment the aircraft is pushed back from the gate.
